script.output: VULNERABLE: Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Microsoft SMBv1 servers (ms17-010) State: VULNERABLE IDs: CVE:CVE-2017-0144 Risk factor: HIGH Description: A critical remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft SMBv1 servers (ms17-010). Disclosure date: 2017-03-14 References: https://technet.microsoft.com/en-us/library/security/ms17-010.aspx https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2017-0144

table.elem: Remote Code Execution vulnerability in Microsoft SMBv1 servers (ms17-010)
A critical remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft SMBv1 servers (ms17-010).
